notes: Convergence-model defect fix via /nw-bugfix -> /nw-design -> /nw-deliver. The authoritative specification is the design at `docs/feature/fix-mesh-only-reconcile-loop/design/convergence-model.md` (authored + ratified by @nw-solution-architect, Propose mode) and the SSOT it amends, `docs/feature/phase-2-xdp-service-map/design/architecture.md` § 8 (`Convergence fingerprint domain`, amended 2026-06-24). The RCA at `docs/feature/fix-mesh-only-reconcile-loop/deliver/rca.md` (§ 10 executed evidence, Lima, 6 ticks/shape) is the evidence base. There are NO DISTILL `.feature` files for this bugfix; `test_file`/`scenario_name` name the concrete Rust targets below.

The defect: `ServiceMapHydrator::reconcile` measures convergence as `actual.fingerprint == desired.fingerprint` over the FULL backend set, but every signal the system produces about `actual` (the action-shim's `Completed` row) covers only the PROGRAMMED-REMOTE subset. The equality is structurally unreachable for any service that isn't remote-only -> three non-converging faces (all-mesh: `None`-arm never settles; mixed mesh+remote: `Completed`-arm TIGHT spin re-dispatching every tick; local-only: no row, never settles). Executed evidence in RCA § 10.2: mixed `dus_ticks=6/6 converged_tick=None`. The fix is a FINGERPRINT-DOMAIN REALIGNMENT (design § 2, Option (i)): dispatch + convergence both key on `programmed_fingerprint = fingerprint(vip, remote_survivors)` — the exact set the action carries and the shim hashes back — with the empty programmable set (all-mesh / local-only) settling via the documented empty-backends `DataplaneUpdateService` purge.

User-ratified decisions (2026-06-24, SETTLED — do NOT re-litigate): (B1) ACCEPTED — the empty-backends purge is the settle mechanism for all-mesh / local-only services (one obs-row write on first dispatch, then zero I/O). (B5) BUILD NOW — the local-backend churn re-drive ships in this fix via mechanism L-a (design § 8.3): an additive CBOR `ServiceMapHydratorView.last_applied_local_fingerprint: BTreeMap<ServiceId, BackendSetFingerprint>` (`#[serde(default)]`, no envelope, no migration) + a DECOUPLED local-emission convergence signal so a changed LOCAL backend set is re-applied independent of the remote-keyed `need_dispatch`. (B2) DEFERRED, tracked as GH #246 (https://github.com/overdrive-sh/overdrive/issues/246) — the EXTERNAL cgroup/local observation surface is NOT built here (production-unreachability + isolated-mechanism rule per CLAUDE.md § 'Build vertical slices… never isolated mechanisms'; the LOCAL partition is empty in production). (B4) AFTER CRAFTER — the pre-existing `ServiceDesired` § 8 doc-drift (`{vip,backends,fingerprint}` vs live `{vip,port,proto,backends,fingerprint}`) is a separate doc-sync done after the crafter lands; it is NOT a step in this roadmap.

DECOMPOSITION (2 steps, coherent + minimal). 01-01 lands the CORE fingerprint-domain realignment on the remote/XDP axis (the actual bug-fix: all four shapes settle, all-mesh/local-only via the empty purge, mixed no longer spins) PLUS its two structural regression guards — the corrected DST invariant (which was a faithless simulation, RCA § 10.4) and the `mesh_backend_lb_gate.rs` gate-test reconciliation (several assertions that encoded the bug INVERT). 01-02 lands the L-a local-churn re-drive (B5=build-now): the additive `ServiceMapHydratorView` View field + the decoupled local-emission convergence signal + a two-tick local-churn regression test. The split is by AXIS: 01-01 is the remote/convergence axis (no View-shape change — pure `programmed_fingerprint` re-key + empty purge); 01-02 is the local-churn axis (the ONE additive View field + decoupled local signal). Both touch `service_map_hydrator.rs`; 01-01 additionally touches the DST invariant file and the gate-test file. Decomposition ratio: 2 steps / 1 distinct production file (`service_map_hydrator.rs`) = 2.0 <= 2.5.

ONLY new persisted surface (whole fix): the additive `ServiceMapHydratorView.last_applied_local_fingerprint` map landed in 01-02 (L-a). Everything else is recomputed-every-tick derived state: `programmed_fingerprint = fingerprint(vip, remote_survivors)` and `local_fingerprint = fingerprint(vip, local_survivors)` are function-local, NEVER persisted (`.claude/rules/development.md` § 'Persist inputs, not derived state'). `reconcile` stays pure / DST-replayable in both steps (time only via `tick.now_unix`; no `Instant::now()`; `cargo xtask dst-lint` stays green). The full-set `desired_svc.fingerprint` is RETAINED unchanged as the churn/identity key (`spec_hash`/`CorrelationKey` input, evaluation-broker re-trigger key) — design § 5.

Per-step Outside-In TDD: each step ships its regression test RED FIRST, then the fix, running the 3-phase DES canon (RED -> GREEN -> COMMIT) internally within the single step. Step IDs match `^\d{2}-\d{2}$`. RED strategy: 01-01's RED is the corrected DST invariant exercising the MIXED shape (the face the faithless harness masked) — it FAILS against current code (tight spin, never converges); the gate-test assertions that encoded the bug (all-mesh emits nothing) also flip RED -> GREEN. 01-02's RED is the two-tick local-churn test (tick 3 must re-emit `RegisterLocalBackend` on a `{B1}->{B2}` change with unchanged remote projection) — it FAILS against any impl that gates the local emit on `need_dispatch`.

Test reconciliation (design § 11) is in-scope for 01-01, NOT a separate step. `mesh_backend_lb_gate.rs` currently ENCODES THE BUG AS THE CONTRACT (a mesh service emits nothing, `programmed_fp == None`, all-mesh `retries` stays empty). Under the fix several assertions INVERT — the all-mesh / local-only cases now emit the empty purge (`dataplane_count` 0->1, emitted backends EMPTY, `programmed_fp == Some(fingerprint(vip,[]))`). Per `.claude/rules/development.md` § 'Deletion discipline' the salvage-by-rewrite is HONEST: the genuinely-new contract gets a new name + new assertions (e.g. `all_mesh_service_emits_nothing_and_keeps_retries_empty_across_ticks` -> `all_mesh_service_settles_via_empty_remote_purge`), NOT a quiet edit pretending it 'always' tested settling. Design § 11.1 enumerates each test's exact change; the remote-only `non_mesh_non_host_backend_still_drives_dataplane_service_update` test is the UNCHANGED regression anchor proving the fix did not break the one shape that already converged.

DST invariant fix (design § 10) is in-scope for 01-01. The current `HydratorEventuallyConverges` invariant (`overdrive-sim/src/invariants/service_map_hydrator.rs`, `evaluate_hydrator_eventually_converges`) is a FAITHLESS SIMULATION: it writes back `Completed{ fingerprint: desired.fingerprint }` (the FULL-set fingerprint) for every emitted `DataplaneUpdateService`, masking the subset mismatch entirely (RCA § 10.4 — this is why every gate missed the bug). The fix models the REAL shim: write back `Completed{ fingerprint: fingerprint(vip, action.backends) }` (the programmed subset, exactly as `dataplane_update_service::dispatch` computes it), and exercise ALL FOUR shapes (remote-only / all-mesh / mixed / local-only) as their own sub-cases — MIXED is the load-bearing addition (the face the faithless echo made structurally undetectable). `HydratorIdempotentSteadyState` (`evaluate_hydrator_idempotent_steady_state`) is similarly extended: after convergence each shape emits ZERO actions per tick (all-mesh / local-only must not re-emit the purge once `Completed{fp(vip,[])}` is observed). Preferred (design § 10.1): drive the REAL action-shim (`dataplane_update_service::dispatch` + `SimDataplane` + `SimObservationStore`) so the harness CANNOT diverge from production.

L-a mechanism pin (01-02, design § 8.3 — ZERO crafter latitude). (1) Add `last_applied_local_fingerprint: BTreeMap<ServiceId, BackendSetFingerprint>` to `ServiceMapHydratorView` (live shape at `service_map_hydrator.rs:187-192`), annotated `#[serde(default)]`. Additive CBOR per `.claude/rules/development.md` § 'Reconciler I/O -> Schema evolution' — a pre-L-a View deserialises to an empty map (NO versioned envelope, NO migration). `retries` is byte-for-byte unchanged. (2) HOIST the local-emission decision OUT of the `if need_dispatch` block so it runs every tick per service, independent of the remote-keyed dispatch gate. Compute `local_fingerprint = fingerprint(vip, local_survivors)` (the post-gate LOCAL partition, `local: Vec<&Backend>` at `service_map_hydrator.rs:392-396`); when `local_fingerprint != next_view.last_applied_local_fingerprint.get(sid)`, emit `push_register_local_backend_actions(&mut actions, &local_survivors, ...)` for the CURRENT local set and record `next_view.last_applied_local_fingerprint.insert(sid, local_fingerprint)`; on equality emit nothing for the local path. (3) GC the new map in lockstep with `retries` (extend the `next_view.retries.retain(...)` at `service_map_hydrator.rs:452` to also `retain` the new map). Gating is SOLELY on the local-fingerprint diff — NOT `need_dispatch`, NOT `programmed_fingerprint`, NOT the `Completed` row. The crafter MUST NOT invent any other shape and MUST NOT partially build it (no View field without the decoupled signal, or vice versa).

Scope discipline (CRITICAL). This roadmap covers EXACTLY the design's two axes (remote fingerprint-domain realignment + L-a local-churn re-drive) plus their regression guards. Do NOT add steps or scope for: the EXTERNAL cgroup observation surface (B2 = GH #246 — DEFERRED, do NOT build); the L-b active deregister-on-removal (design § 8.3, a SUPERSET of L-a requiring a `DeregisterLocalBackend` trigger shape out of scope here); the `ServiceDesired` § 8 doc-drift sync (B4 = AFTER CRAFTER, a separate doc-sync, NOT a step). If the crafter discovers a needed deferral beyond GH #246, surface it to the user for approval — do NOT run `gh issue create` (CLAUDE.md § 'Deferrals require GitHub issues — AND user approval BEFORE creation'). GH #246 already exists; cite it, do not re-create it.

Standing user-rule references the crafter must obey across both steps: (1) `feedback_single_cut_greenfield_migrations` — no shims, no deprecations; old + new land in the same commit (the inverted gate-test assertions, the corrected DST invariant, the empty-purge emit all land in 01-01's single commit; the View field + decoupled signal in 01-02's single commit). (2) `feedback_no_git_stash` — focused-subset commits use `git add <paths>` + `git restore --staged`, never `git stash`. (3) `feedback_fix_clippy_dont_defer` — clippy `-D warnings` issues surfaced during the work get fixed in-scope. (4) `feedback_delete_dont_gate` — the gate-test assertions that encoded the bug are DELETED and replaced (renamed test fns with new assertions), not `#[ignore]`d or commented. (5) `feedback_red_scaffold_should_panic` — where a RED scaffold is needed use `#[should_panic(expected = "RED scaffold")]`; here the RED state is a real failing assertion / failing DST invariant against current code (no scaffold attribute needed). (6) `CLAUDE.md § 'Implement to the design'` — match the design's exact API shape; the ONLY new persisted surface is the additive `last_applied_local_fingerprint` View field; do NOT invent any other public method/type/variant.

Mutation gate per step (post-GREEN, `run_in_background: true` per `.claude/rules/testing.md` § 'Mutation testing is the exception'). 01-01: `cargo xtask mutants --diff origin/main --package overdrive-core --file crates/overdrive-core/src/reconcilers/service_map_hydrator.rs` (the `programmed_fingerprint` computation, the re-keyed `should_dispatch` call, the unconditional emit, the retry-bump, the convergence-reset are the mutation surface). 01-02: same package + file (the L-a local-fingerprint diff + the GC `retain` are the mutation surface). Kill-rate gate >=80%. On a surviving mutation, add a disambiguating test case — never weaken an assertion. cargo-mutants restores the tree itself; do NOT run `git checkout -- crates/`. (The DST invariant + gate-test live in default-lane / `overdrive-sim`; `service_map_hydrator.rs`'s default-lane unit tests + the gate-test transitively kill the reconcile mutations.)

Roadmap-validator length warnings (`STEP_NAME_TOO_LONG`, `CRITERIA_TOO_LONG`, `DESCRIPTION_TOO_LONG`) are cosmetic and non-blocking per CLAUDE.md § 'Roadmap validator warnings' — Overdrive ACs deliberately carry scenario-level specificity (test fn names, the four service shapes, the `fingerprint(vip, remote_survivors)` domain pin, invariant names). Do NOT trim ACs to silence these warnings.

phases.name: Realign the ServiceMapHydrator convergence fingerprint to the programmable-remote projection, settle the empty set via the documented purge, and build the L-a local-churn re-drive
phases.description: Two-step Outside-In TDD fix for the fingerprint-domain mismatch that makes 3 of 4 service shapes never converge. 01-01 (core realignment, remote/convergence axis): compute `programmed_fingerprint = fingerprint(vip, remote_survivors)`; re-key the `should_dispatch` call + the convergence-reset arm + the retry-bump onto it; emit `DataplaneUpdateService` UNCONDITIONALLY on dispatch (drop the `if !remote_is_empty` guard on both the V4 and V6 arms) so the empty set is the contract-blessed purge (settles all-mesh / local-only AND tears down stranded REVERSE_NAT/SERVICE_MAP entries — Finding 2 folded in); correct the FAITHLESS DST invariant to model the real shim's write-back fingerprint over all four shapes (mixed is load-bearing); reconcile the bug-encoding `mesh_backend_lb_gate.rs` assertions per the Deletion discipline. 01-02 (L-a local-churn re-drive, local axis): add the additive `ServiceMapHydratorView.last_applied_local_fingerprint` View field; hoist the `RegisterLocalBackend` emission onto a DECOUPLED `local_fingerprint` convergence signal independent of the remote-keyed `need_dispatch`; GC the new map in lockstep with `retries`; pin with a two-tick local-churn regression test. Out of scope (do NOT add steps): the EXTERNAL cgroup observation surface (B2 = GH #246, deferred), L-b active deregister (superset of L-a), the `ServiceDesired` § 8 doc-sync (B4 = after crafter).

steps.name: Core fingerprint-domain realignment — converge over the programmable-remote projection, settle the empty set via the documented purge, correct the faithless DST invariant, reconcile the gate-test
steps.description: RED -> GREEN -> COMMIT in one step. Targets: `crates/overdrive-core/src/reconcilers/service_map_hydrator.rs` (`reconcile`), `crates/overdrive-sim/src/invariants/service_map_hydrator.rs` (the DST invariant), `crates/overdrive-core/tests/mesh_backend_lb_gate.rs` (the gate-test). RED: correct the DST invariant `evaluate_hydrator_eventually_converges` to model the REAL shim — write back `Completed{ fingerprint: fingerprint(vip, action.backends) }` (the programmed subset) NOT `Completed{ fingerprint: desired.fingerprint }` (the faithless full-set echo, currently at the write-back site ~:108-135), and exercise all four shapes (remote-only `[10.96.0.50]`, all-mesh `[10.99.0.6, 10.99.0.10]`, MIXED `[10.99.0.6, 10.96.0.50]`, local-only `[host_ipv4]`) each as its own sub-case; the MIXED sub-case FAILS against current production code (tight spin, `converged_tick=None`, RCA § 10.2). Preferred per design § 10.1: drive the REAL action-shim (`dataplane_update_service::dispatch` + `SimDataplane` + `SimObservationStore`) so the harness CANNOT diverge from production. GREEN — LOGIC (design § 3): (1) per service, AFTER the mesh/local/remote partition and BEFORE the dispatch decision, compute `let programmed_fingerprint = crate::dataplane::fingerprint::fingerprint(&desired_svc.vip, &remote_survivors)` where `remote_survivors` is the post-gate REMOTE survivor set (= the existing `remote` at :392-396, owned, deterministic BTreeMap order); for a V6 VIP `remote_survivors == non_mesh`. (2) Change the `should_dispatch` CALL (:323-328) to pass `programmed_fingerprint` for the `desired_fingerprint` parameter (signature UNCHANGED). (3) Replace the GUARDED remote emit (`if !remote_is_empty`, :401) with an UNCONDITIONAL emit on dispatch — `backends: remote_survivors.clone()` MAY be empty (the documented per-proto purge, `traits/dataplane.rs:197-204`); apply the SAME unconditional-emit + same `programmed_fingerprint` discipline to the V6 arm (:367, drop `if !non_mesh.is_empty()`). (4) In the retry-bump, DROP the `if !(local_is_empty && remote_is_empty)` guard (:437) and record `entry.last_attempted_fingerprint = Some(programmed_fingerprint)`. (5) Convergence-reset arm (:445): compare `*fingerprint == programmed_fingerprint`. (6) `spec_hash` (:332) stays keyed on the full-set `desired_svc.fingerprint` (UNCHANGED — the churn/identity key). The `RegisterLocalBackend` emission (`push_register_local_backend_actions`) is UNCHANGED in this step (its L-a decoupling lands in 01-02). GREEN — TEST reconciliation (design § 11.1, Deletion discipline): `all_mesh_service_emits_nothing_and_keeps_retries_empty_across_ticks` (:346) and `v6_vip_all_mesh_service_emits_nothing_and_keeps_retries_empty` (:494) — REWRITE to the new contract (rename e.g. `all_mesh_service_settles_via_empty_remote_purge`: tick 1 emits ONE empty-purge `DataplaneUpdateService`, records `last_attempted_fingerprint = Some(fp(vip,[]))`; given `Completed{fp(vip,[])}` in `actual`, tick 2 emits ZERO actions, clears `retries`). `mesh_subnet_backend_programs_neither_local_nor_remote_lb_path` (:132) — INVERT: `register_count == 0` (unchanged), `dataplane_count == 1` (was 0), emitted backends EMPTY, `programmed_fp == Some(fp(vip,[]))` (was None). `host_address_backend_still_registers_as_local_backend` (:160) — `register_count == 1` UNCHANGED, `dataplane_count` 0->1 (empty purge), emitted backends EMPTY, `programmed_fp` over the EMPTY set. `three_way_split_routes_each_address_class_to_exactly_one_disposition` (PBT, :527) — rewrite the mesh arm (now all-mesh: `(0,1,Some(fp(vip,[])))`) and the local arm (`(1,1,Some(fp(vip,[])))`); the remote arm stays `(0,1,Some(fp(vip,[remote])))`. `non_mesh_non_host_backend_still_drives_dataplane_service_update` (:190) and `mixed_service_excludes_mesh_keeps_remote_backend_and_registers_local` (:254) and `v6_vip_service_excludes_mesh_backend_from_dataplane_update` (:425) — UNCHANGED (the remote payload is preserved). Also extend `HydratorIdempotentSteadyState` (`evaluate_hydrator_idempotent_steady_state`) so each of the four shapes emits ZERO actions per tick after convergence. COMMIT: single cohesive commit, `Step-ID: 01-01` trailer, normal hooks.
steps.criteria: `reconcile` computes `programmed_fingerprint = fingerprint(desired_svc.vip, remote_survivors)` per service and keys the `should_dispatch` call, the convergence-reset comparison, and the `last_attempted_fingerprint` record onto it. The remote emit is UNCONDITIONAL (the `if !remote_is_empty` and `if !non_mesh.is_empty()` guards are deleted — `git grep -n 'remote_is_empty\|non_mesh.is_empty' crates/overdrive-core/src/reconcilers/service_map_hydrator.rs` shows no surviving EMIT guard); an empty `remote_survivors` emits a `DataplaneUpdateService { backends: [] }` purge. The retry-bump empty-set guard (`if !(local_is_empty && remote_is_empty)`) is deleted. `spec_hash` stays keyed on the full-set `desired_svc.fingerprint`. `should_dispatch`'s 4-arg signature is unchanged; `RetryMemory` / `ServiceMapHydratorView` field shapes are unchanged in THIS step (the L-a field lands in 01-02). The DST invariant `evaluate_hydrator_eventually_converges` writes back `fingerprint(vip, action.backends)` (or drives the real shim) and exercises all four shapes; the MIXED sub-case fails RED against current code and passes GREEN after the fix; `HydratorIdempotentSteadyState` asserts zero post-convergence actions per shape. The `mesh_backend_lb_gate.rs` assertions are reconciled per design § 11.1 (all-mesh / local-only / PBT-mesh-arm INVERT to the empty-purge contract; remote-only + mixed-remote-payload + V6-remote UNCHANGED). `cargo nextest run -p overdrive-core` green; `cargo dst` green (the corrected invariant passes for the fixed code); `cargo nextest run --workspace` exits 0; `cargo test --doc -p overdrive-core` exits 0; `cargo xtask dst-lint` exits 0 (`reconcile` stays pure over `tick.now_unix`); `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` clean on overdrive-core + overdrive-sim. Mutation gate >=80% on `service_map_hydrator.rs`. Commit carries `Step-ID: 01-01`; no `--no-verify`.
acceptance_criteria: Design § 2 / § 3 (core realignment) — `reconcile`'s dispatch decision AND convergence comparison both key on `programmed_fingerprint = fingerprint(vip, remote_survivors)`, the EXACT set the emitted `DataplaneUpdateService` carries and the action-shim hashes back. Byte-identical to `dataplane_update_service::dispatch`'s `fingerprint(vip, action.backends)`, making `Completed.fingerprint == programmed_fingerprint` reachable for every shape.

Design § 4 (all-mesh settled state) — an all-mesh service emits exactly ONE empty-backends `DataplaneUpdateService` purge on first dispatch, round-trips to `Completed{fp(vip,[])}`, and settles (zero actions thereafter). NOT special-cased — the empty programmable set flows through the SAME unconditional-emit path; `∅` is the degenerate value.

Design § 6 (Finding 2) — removing the `if !remote_is_empty` guard lets the contract-blessed empty-backends purge fire on a non-mesh->all-mesh transition, tearing down stranded REVERSE_NAT/SERVICE_MAP entries. Zero risk (a strict no-op if the transition never occurs).

Design § 10 (DST invariant — the structural regression guard) — `evaluate_hydrator_eventually_converges` models the REAL shim's write-back (`fingerprint(vip, action.backends)`, or drives the real shim) and exercises all four shapes; the MIXED sub-case is the load-bearing addition (the face the faithless echo, RCA § 10.4, made structurally undetectable). A future re-introduction of the full-set/subset domain mismatch fails the mixed sub-case within `CONVERGENCE_TICK_BUDGET`.

Design § 11.1 (gate-test reconciliation, Deletion discipline) — the assertions that ENCODED THE BUG (all-mesh emits nothing, `programmed_fp == None`) are honestly REWRITTEN (new test names, new assertions for the empty-purge contract), NOT quietly edited or `#[ignore]`d. The remote-only `non_mesh_non_host_backend_still_drives_dataplane_service_update` is the UNCHANGED regression anchor.

Design § 5 (full-set fingerprint retained) — `desired_svc.fingerprint` (full-set) is UNCHANGED: still computed by `project_service_desired`, still the `spec_hash`/`CorrelationKey` input, still the evaluation-broker churn key. Demoted from convergence target to churn/identity key; no code computing or persisting it changes.

Persist inputs, not derived state (`.claude/rules/development.md`) — `programmed_fingerprint` is recomputed every tick from inputs (`backends`, `workload_subnet`, `host_ipv4`), NEVER persisted. NO new persisted surface in this step (the L-a View field is 01-02).
Reconciler purity preserved — `reconcile` stays pure over `(desired, actual, view, tick)`; `cargo xtask dst-lint` exits 0 (time only via `tick.now_unix`, no `Instant::now()` / `SystemTime::now()`).

Single-cut migration (`feedback_single_cut_greenfield_migrations`) — the logic re-key, the unconditional emit, the corrected DST invariant, and the gate-test reconciliation all land in one commit; no shadow comparison, no two-phase rollout.

Mutation gate >=80% on `service_map_hydrator.rs`; the four-shape DST invariant + the reconciled gate-test jointly kill the 'compare against full-set' / 'suppress the empty emit' / 'echo desired fingerprint' mutation classes.
Commit message carries `Step-ID: 01-01` trailer; normal pre-commit hooks pass (no `--no-verify`).
steps.tier: Tier 1 (DST invariant — `cargo dst`, the corrected `HydratorEventuallyConverges` / `HydratorIdempotentSteadyState` over all four shapes; the faithless-harness fix is the structural guard) + default-lane gate-test (`mesh_backend_lb_gate.rs`, pure over `reconcile` typed inputs, no I/O). Mutation scope: `cargo xtask mutants --diff origin/main --package overdrive-core --file crates/overdrive-core/src/reconcilers/service_map_hydrator.rs`.
quality_gates: RED verified at runtime BEFORE the logic change: the corrected DST invariant's MIXED sub-case fails against current code (`converged_tick=None`, tight spin per RCA § 10.2). Watch it fail, then land the fix. The gate-test all-mesh assertions also fail RED (they expect emit-nothing) before the empty-purge fix flips them GREEN.

After the fix: `cargo dst` green (all four shapes converge <= 2 ticks; idempotent steady-state emits zero actions); `cargo nextest run -p overdrive-core` green (reconciled gate-test passes); the rewritten all-mesh tests carry new names + new assertions (`git grep all_mesh_service_emits_nothing` returns nothing after the rename).

`git grep -n 'remote_is_empty\|non_mesh.is_empty' crates/overdrive-core/src/reconcilers/service_map_hydrator.rs` shows no surviving EMIT guard (the unconditional emit replaced both V4 and V6 guards); the retry-bump empty-set guard `if !(local_is_empty && remote_is_empty)` is gone.

`git grep -n 'desired_svc.fingerprint' crates/overdrive-core/src/reconcilers/service_map_hydrator.rs` shows it surviving ONLY at the `spec_hash` derivation (:332) — the `should_dispatch` call, the retry-bump, and the convergence-reset all key on `programmed_fingerprint`.

`cargo nextest run --workspace` exits 0; `cargo test --doc -p overdrive-core` exits 0; `cargo xtask lima run -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets --features integration-tests` exits 0 (macOS Lima compile-check); full integration run inside Lima VM (or LVH on CI) exits 0.

`cargo xtask dst-lint` exits 0 (`reconcile` stays pure; the DST invariant uses only sim adapters + `tick`-derived time); `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` clean on overdrive-core AND overdrive-sim.

Mutation gate (post-GREEN, `run_in_background: true`): `cargo xtask mutants --diff origin/main --package overdrive-core --file crates/overdrive-core/src/reconcilers/service_map_hydrator.rs` reports >=80% kill rate. cargo-mutants restores the tree itself; do NOT run `git checkout -- crates/`.
Production edit precision: `git diff --name-only HEAD~1` shows exactly the three files (`service_map_hydrator.rs`, the DST invariant, the gate-test); no incidental edits.
deliverables: Single cohesive commit landing the `programmed_fingerprint` realignment (compute + re-key `should_dispatch` call + unconditional emit on V4 & V6 + retry-bump + convergence-reset; `spec_hash` retained on full-set), the corrected four-shape DST invariant (real-shim write-back), and the reconciled `mesh_backend_lb_gate.rs` assertions (honest rewrite per Deletion discipline).
The DST invariant MIXED sub-case + the inverted all-mesh gate-test assertions transition RED -> GREEN within this commit; the remote-only regression anchor stays GREEN.
steps.implementation_notes: TEST PARADIGM (mandatory): Rust workspace — the regression guards are (a) a DST invariant (`cargo dst`, `overdrive-sim`) and (b) default-lane gate-tests (`#[test]` over `reconcile` typed inputs). EXEMPT FROM PYTHON-PBT PARADIGM: no Hypothesis in Rust. The four service shapes (remote-only / all-mesh / mixed / local-only) ARE the partition of the convergence input space; the DST invariant exercises each as a sub-case and the gate-test PBT (`three_way_split_routes_each_address_class_to_exactly_one_disposition`, proptest) already covers the single-backend address-class partition — that is the idiomatic Rust shape and is NOT a paradigm bypass. DES phase mapping within this step: PREPARE — re-read design § 2/§ 3/§ 4/§ 6/§ 10/§ 11.1 and RCA § 10.2-10.4; read `reconcile` (`service_map_hydrator.rs:311-455`), `should_dispatch` (:544-575), the partition at :392-396, `dataplane_update_service::dispatch` (the real shim's `fingerprint(vip, backends)`), and the faithless DST write-back (`overdrive-sim/.../service_map_hydrator.rs` ~:108-135). RED_ACCEPTANCE — correct the DST invariant to model the real shim + exercise all four shapes; run `cargo dst` and watch the MIXED sub-case fail. Also flip the all-mesh gate-test assertions RED. RED_UNIT — N/A (no new internal helper; the change is the `programmed_fingerprint` re-key + the emit-guard removal). GREEN — use Serena `find_symbol` / `replace_symbol_body` on `reconcile` to insert `programmed_fingerprint`, re-key the call/retry-bump/reset, and replace the guarded emits with unconditional emits on both arms. Reconcile the gate-test assertions per design § 11.1 (rename + rewrite the all-mesh / local-only / PBT-mesh-arm cases; leave the remote-only / mixed-remote-payload / V6-remote cases UNCHANGED). Run the default lane, `cargo dst`, the Lima compile-check, dst-lint + clippy. COMMIT — `git commit` (no `--no-verify`), body cites design § 2/§ 3/§ 4/§ 6/§ 10/§ 11.1 + RCA § 10; `Step-ID: 01-01` trailer. POST-GREEN mutation run with `run_in_background: true`; parse `target/xtask/mutants-summary.json`. Record phase transitions via `PYTHONPATH=$HOME/.claude/lib/python python3 -m des.cli.log_phase` — do NOT edit `execution-log.json` directly.

steps.name: B5 / L-a local-churn re-drive — add the additive last_applied_local_fingerprint View field and drive RegisterLocalBackend on a decoupled local-fingerprint signal independent of need_dispatch
steps.description: RED -> GREEN -> COMMIT in one step. Target: `crates/overdrive-core/src/reconcilers/service_map_hydrator.rs` (`reconcile` + the `ServiceMapHydratorView` struct). This step builds mechanism L-a (design § 8.3, B5=build-now) so a LOCAL backend-set change is re-applied independent of the remote-keyed `need_dispatch`. RED: add a default-lane two-tick (three-evaluation) local-churn test `local_backend_churn_redrives_register_local_backend_independent_of_remote_gate` in `mesh_backend_lb_gate.rs` (or the adjacent `#[cfg(test)]` block of `service_map_hydrator.rs`) per design § 11.4: tick 1 (local set `{B1}` at `host_ipv4`, `actual=None`, `view=default`) emits ONE `RegisterLocalBackend` for `{B1}` and records `next_view.last_applied_local_fingerprint[sid] == fingerprint(vip, [B1])`; tick 2 (same `{B1}`, `actual=Completed{fp(vip,[])}`, `view`=tick-1 next_view) emits ZERO `RegisterLocalBackend` AND ZERO `DataplaneUpdateService` (settled); tick 3 (local set `{B1}`->`{B2}`, remote projection UNCHANGED so `programmed_fingerprint` unchanged and `should_dispatch` STILL false) MUST emit a fresh `RegisterLocalBackend` for `{B2}` driven by the decoupled `local_fingerprint != last_applied_local_fingerprint` signal and record the new applied fingerprint. Against current code (after 01-01) tick 3 emits NOTHING (the local emit is gated by `need_dispatch`) -> RED. GREEN (design § 8.3, ZERO crafter latitude): (1) Add `#[serde(default)] pub last_applied_local_fingerprint: BTreeMap<ServiceId, BackendSetFingerprint>` to `ServiceMapHydratorView` (live shape at :187-192); additive CBOR — a pre-L-a View deserialises to an empty map (NO versioned envelope, NO migration); `retries` is byte-for-byte unchanged. (2) HOIST the local-emission decision OUT of the `if need_dispatch` block so it runs every tick per service: compute `let local_fingerprint = crate::dataplane::fingerprint::fingerprint(&desired_svc.vip, &local_survivors)` (the post-gate LOCAL partition — the existing `local: Vec<&Backend>` at :392-396; for a V6 VIP `local_survivors` is empty and the seam is a no-op); when `next_view.last_applied_local_fingerprint.get(service_id) != Some(&local_fingerprint)`, call `push_register_local_backend_actions(&mut actions, &local_survivors, &LocalBackendEmit { .. })` for the CURRENT local set and `next_view.last_applied_local_fingerprint.insert(*service_id, local_fingerprint)`; on equality emit nothing for the local path. The OLD `push_register_local_backend_actions` call inside `if need_dispatch` (:416-427) MOVES to this decoupled seam (it must NOT remain double-gated). (3) Extend the GC `retain` (:452) so `next_view.last_applied_local_fingerprint.retain(|sid, _| desired.desired.contains_key(sid))` runs in lockstep with the `retries` GC. The gating is SOLELY on the local-fingerprint diff — NOT `need_dispatch`, NOT `programmed_fingerprint`, NOT the `Completed` row. Time only via `tick.now_unix` (the seam reads no time); `reconcile` stays pure / DST-replayable. Also extend the DST `HydratorIdempotentSteadyState` so a settled local-only service emits zero `RegisterLocalBackend` per tick once `local_fingerprint == last_applied` (no spurious re-emit). COMMIT: single cohesive commit, `Step-ID: 01-02`, normal hooks.
steps.criteria: `ServiceMapHydratorView` gains exactly ONE additive field `last_applied_local_fingerprint: BTreeMap<ServiceId, BackendSetFingerprint>` annotated `#[serde(default)]` (additive CBOR; `git grep -n 'VersionedEnvelope\|into_latest' crates/overdrive-core/src/reconcilers/service_map_hydrator.rs` returns nothing — NO envelope, NO migration); `retries` is unchanged; `RetryMemory` is unchanged. The `RegisterLocalBackend` emission is DECOUPLED from `need_dispatch`: it is gated on `local_fingerprint != next_view.last_applied_local_fingerprint.get(sid)` and the OLD call inside the `if need_dispatch` block is removed (`push_register_local_backend_actions` appears at exactly ONE call site, OUTSIDE the `if need_dispatch` block). The new map is GC'd in lockstep with `retries`. `local_fingerprint` and `programmed_fingerprint` are recomputed every tick, NEVER persisted; only the last-APPLIED local fingerprint VALUE is persisted. The two-tick local-churn test passes (tick 3 re-emits `RegisterLocalBackend` for `{B2}` on the local-set change with unchanged remote projection); it FAILS against an implementation that gates the local emit on `need_dispatch`. The DST idempotent-steady-state invariant asserts zero local re-emit once settled. `cargo nextest run -p overdrive-core` green; `cargo dst` green; `cargo nextest run --workspace` exits 0; `cargo test --doc -p overdrive-core` exits 0; `cargo xtask dst-lint` exits 0 (the local seam reads no time; `reconcile` stays pure); `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` clean on overdrive-core. Mutation gate >=80% on `service_map_hydrator.rs`. Commit carries `Step-ID: 01-02`; no `--no-verify`.
acceptance_criteria: Design § 8.3 (L-a, B5=build-now) — `ServiceMapHydratorView` gains the additive `last_applied_local_fingerprint: BTreeMap<ServiceId, BackendSetFingerprint>` field (`#[serde(default)]`); the `RegisterLocalBackend` emission is driven by a DECOUPLED per-service `local_fingerprint = fingerprint(vip, local_survivors)` convergence signal, gated SOLELY on the local-fingerprint diff INDEPENDENT of the remote-keyed `need_dispatch`.

Design § 8.2 / § 11.4 (the local-churn guarantee) — a local-backend add/remove/health-flip with an UNCHANGED remote projection IS re-driven; pinned by the two-tick test `local_backend_churn_redrives_register_local_backend_independent_of_remote_gate` (tick 3 re-emits for `{B2}` while `programmed_fingerprint` and `should_dispatch` are unchanged). RED against a `need_dispatch`-gated impl, GREEN after L-a.

Additive CBOR schema evolution (`.claude/rules/development.md` § 'Reconciler I/O -> Schema evolution') — the new field is `#[serde(default)]`; a pre-L-a View (no field) deserialises with an empty map. NO versioned envelope, NO migration, NO rkyv schema evolution (the View is CBOR in the runtime-owned ViewStore). `retries` is byte-for-byte unchanged.

Persist inputs, not derived state (`.claude/rules/development.md`) — the map persists the INPUT (the applied local-set fingerprint), NOT a derived 'needs re-drive' boolean; the re-drive decision is recomputed every tick from the persisted input + the freshly-computed `local_fingerprint`. `programmed_fingerprint` / `local_fingerprint` are function-local, never persisted.
GC in lockstep — `last_applied_local_fingerprint` entries for services no longer in `desired` are dropped by the same `retain` pass that GCs `retries`; the two maps never drift.

Single call site — `push_register_local_backend_actions` is called from EXACTLY ONE place, OUTSIDE the `if need_dispatch` block (the old double-gated call inside it is MOVED, not duplicated, per `feedback_single_cut_greenfield_migrations`).

Minimal surface (B2 boundary, GH #246) — the fix adds the View field + the decoupled signal ONLY; it does NOT add an external cgroup observation surface (deferred, GH #246), does NOT add a `DeregisterLocalBackend` trigger (L-b, out of scope), does NOT add any other public method/type/variant (CLAUDE.md § 'Implement to the design').
Reconciler purity preserved — the local seam reads no wall-clock; `reconcile` stays pure over `(desired, actual, view, tick)`; `cargo xtask dst-lint` exits 0.

Mutation gate >=80% on `service_map_hydrator.rs`; the two-tick churn test + the idempotent-steady-state DST invariant kill the 'gate the local emit on need_dispatch' / 'skip the last_applied update' / 'flip the fingerprint-diff comparator' / 'skip the GC retain' mutation classes.
Commit message carries `Step-ID: 01-02` trailer; normal pre-commit hooks pass (no `--no-verify`).
steps.tier: Tier 1 (default-lane two-tick local-churn test, pure over `reconcile` typed inputs across three sequential evaluations, no I/O, no sim adapters, no feature flag) + Tier 1 DST idempotent-steady-state extension (`cargo dst`). Mutation scope: `cargo xtask mutants --diff origin/main --package overdrive-core --file crates/overdrive-core/src/reconcilers/service_map_hydrator.rs`.
quality_gates: RED verified at runtime BEFORE the fix: `local_backend_churn_redrives_register_local_backend_independent_of_remote_gate`'s tick 3 emits NOTHING against the post-01-01 code (the local emit is still gated by `need_dispatch`; the remote projection is unchanged so `should_dispatch` is false). Watch it fail, then land L-a.

After the fix: the two-tick churn test passes (tick 1 installs + records; tick 2 settles zero-I/O; tick 3 re-emits for `{B2}`); `cargo nextest run -p overdrive-core` green; `cargo dst` green (idempotent steady-state still holds, plus the new local-set-stable no-re-emit assertion).
`git grep -n 'push_register_local_backend_actions' crates/overdrive-core/src/reconcilers/service_map_hydrator.rs` shows exactly ONE call site, NOT inside the `if need_dispatch` block.

`git grep -n 'last_applied_local_fingerprint' crates/overdrive-core/src/reconcilers/service_map_hydrator.rs` shows: the View field (`#[serde(default)]`), the per-tick diff/insert in `reconcile`, and the GC `retain`. No other persisted surface added (`git grep -n 'serde(default)' ...` shows the new field + the unchanged `retries`).

`cargo nextest run --workspace` exits 0; `cargo test --doc -p overdrive-core` exits 0; `cargo xtask lima run -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets --features integration-tests` exits 0 (macOS Lima compile-check); full integration run inside Lima VM (or LVH on CI) exits 0.
`cargo xtask dst-lint` exits 0 (the local seam reads no `Instant::now()`); `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` clean on overdrive-core.

Mutation gate (post-GREEN, `run_in_background: true`): `cargo xtask mutants --diff origin/main --package overdrive-core --file crates/overdrive-core/src/reconcilers/service_map_hydrator.rs` reports >=80% kill rate. cargo-mutants restores the tree; do NOT run `git checkout -- crates/`.
Production edit precision: `git diff --name-only HEAD~1` shows exactly the two files (`service_map_hydrator.rs`, the gate-test); no incidental edits.
deliverables: Single cohesive commit landing the additive `ServiceMapHydratorView.last_applied_local_fingerprint` field, the decoupled local-emission seam (hoisted out of `if need_dispatch`, gated on the local-fingerprint diff), and the lockstep GC `retain`.

The two-tick local-churn test `local_backend_churn_redrives_register_local_backend_independent_of_remote_gate` transitions RED -> GREEN within this commit; the DST idempotent-steady-state invariant gains the no-spurious-local-re-emit assertion.
steps.implementation_notes: TEST PARADIGM (mandatory): Rust workspace — the regression guard is a default-lane multi-tick `#[test]` driving `reconcile` across three sequential evaluations (threading `next_view` forward). EXEMPT FROM PYTHON-PBT PARADIGM: no Hypothesis in Rust; the multi-tick local-churn contract is a wiring/sequencing assertion (does the decoupled signal re-fire on a local-set change?) best pinned by an explicit three-step fixture, not a property. DES phase mapping: PREPARE — re-read design § 8.2/§ 8.3/§ 11.4 and the live `ServiceMapHydratorView` (`service_map_hydrator.rs:187-192`), the partition at :392-396 (the `local: Vec<&Backend>` arm), the `push_register_local_backend_actions` call inside `if need_dispatch` (:416-427), and the GC `retain` (:452). Confirm 01-01 is landed. RED_ACCEPTANCE — write the two-tick churn test (thread `next_view` from tick 1 -> tick 2 -> tick 3; tick 3 changes the local set `{B1}`->`{B2}` with the remote projection unchanged); watch tick 3 emit nothing -> RED. RED_UNIT — N/A. GREEN — use Serena `replace_symbol_body` on the `ServiceMapHydratorView` struct (add the `#[serde(default)]` field) and on `reconcile` (hoist the local-emission decision out of `if need_dispatch`, compute `local_fingerprint`, gate the emit on the diff, record the applied fingerprint, extend the GC `retain`). MOVE the `push_register_local_backend_actions` call out of `if need_dispatch` — it must not remain double-gated. Run the default lane, `cargo dst`, the Lima compile-check, dst-lint + clippy. NOTE (additive CBOR, NOT rkyv): the View is CBOR-encoded in the runtime-owned ViewStore; `#[serde(default)]` is the additive-tolerance mechanism — do NOT reach for a rkyv VersionedEnvelope here (that path governs observation rows + intent aggregates, NOT the CBOR View). COMMIT — `git commit` (no `--no-verify`), body cites design § 8.3 (L-a) + B5 + 'Persist inputs, not derived state' + the additive-CBOR schema-evolution rule; `Step-ID: 01-02` trailer. POST-GREEN mutation run with `run_in_background: true`; parse `target/xtask/mutants-summary.json`. Record phase transitions via `PYTHONPATH=$HOME/.claude/lib/python python3 -m des.cli.log_phase`.

validation.notes: Draft pending `des.cli.roadmap validate` + the @nw-solution-architect-reviewer gate. Decomposition ratio: 2 steps / 1 distinct production file (`service_map_hydrator.rs`) = 2.0 <= 2.5. 01-01 additionally touches the DST invariant (`overdrive-sim/src/invariants/service_map_hydrator.rs`) and the gate-test (`overdrive-core/tests/mesh_backend_lb_gate.rs`) as TEST files (the structural regression guards). Every step has files_to_modify (no validation-only steps); step IDs match ^\d{2}-\d{2}$. There are NO DISTILL .feature files for this bugfix — test_file/scenario_name name concrete Rust targets: 01-01 -> the corrected DST invariant `evaluate_hydrator_eventually_converges` (mixed sub-case) + the reconciled `mesh_backend_lb_gate.rs`; 01-02 -> the two-tick `local_backend_churn_redrives_register_local_backend_independent_of_remote_gate`. The ONLY new persisted surface across the fix is the additive `ServiceMapHydratorView.last_applied_local_fingerprint` map (01-02, L-a, B5=build-now). B2 (external cgroup observation surface) is DEFERRED to GH #246 — NOT a step. B4 (ServiceDesired § 8 doc-sync) is AFTER CRAFTER — NOT a step.
